title: Opening for Production Engineer at Birla Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Birla Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!
